name: @mcp-vertex/web
description: Product/documentation site for @mcp-vertex/core, generated from the live tool registry (tools + capabilities.json stay in sync with the code).

scripts.dev: bun run sync:public-api && bun run gen:manifests && bun run dev:api & PAGES_BASE='' astro dev
scripts.preview: bun run sync:public-api && bun run gen:manifests && astro preview
scripts.check: bun run sync:public-api && bun run gen:manifests && astro check
scripts.build: bun scripts/check-i18n.ts && bun run sync:public-api && bun scripts/gen-capabilities.ts && bun scripts/gen-skills.ts && bun scripts/gen-plugin-logos.ts && astro build && bun run index:search
scripts.build:strict: bun scripts/check-i18n.ts && bun run sync:public-api && bun scripts/gen-capabilities.ts --strict && bun scripts/gen-skills.ts --strict && bun scripts/gen-plugin-logos.ts && astro build && bun run index:search
